name: Buyer DB Re-engagement Email #2
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

Just checking in — did you get a chance to look at your updated home search I've been sending? I want to make sure the listings you’re seeing match exactly what you’re looking for.

Here’s your custom home search link again: %custom_ylopo_listing_alert%

If anything needs tweaking, or if your home search plans have changed, just let me know!


Best,
subject: Home Search Update for %contact_name% follow up – Dunlap Real Estate
